sultanahmet.name: Matbah
sultanahmet.note: Ottoman palace cuisine in a cellar dining room — order the lamb saray.

sultanahmet.name: Seven Hills Restaurant
sultanahmet.note: Rooftop with the Blue Mosque lit up in front of you. Reserve at sunset.

sultanahmet.name: Tarihi Sultanahmet Köftecisi
sultanahmet.note: Köfte on a marble counter since 1920. Two skewers, salad, pickle, ayran. Done.

beyoglu.name: Mikla
beyoglu.note: Marmara Pera rooftop. The fine-dining tasting menu is worth the price; the bar is worth the photo.

beyoglu.name: Karaköy Lokantası
beyoglu.note: The meyhane that defined modern Istanbul. Order meze, raki, fresh fish — let it run long.

beyoglu.name: Çiçek Pasajı
beyoglu.note: Old-school flower passage. Pick any meyhane along the lane; they're all priced the same.

besiktas-ortakoy.name: Tugra at Çırağan Palace
besiktas-ortakoy.note: Bosphorus-front Ottoman fine dining. Special-occasion only.

besiktas-ortakoy.name: Eleos Çengelköy
besiktas-ortakoy.note: Greek-style mezze on the Asian side; ferry over for sunset.

besiktas-ortakoy.name: Kebapçı İskender Beşiktaş
besiktas-ortakoy.note: Solid kebab spot near the ferry terminal.

kadikoy.name: Çiya Sofrası
kadikoy.note: Musa Dağdeviren's regional Anatolian cuisine. Walk the buffet, point at what looks new.

kadikoy.name: Kanaat Lokantası
kadikoy.note: Üsküdar institution since 1933. The lokanta classics done at their reference point.

kadikoy.name: Karabatak
kadikoy.note: Third-wave coffee + brunch in a courtyard. The Karaköy original spawned the chain.

sisli-nisantasi.name: Hünkar
sisli-nisantasi.note: Refined Turkish home cooking, Nişantaşı address, lunch crowd of business families.

sisli-nisantasi.name: Lacivert Restaurant
sisli-nisantasi.note: Bosphorus shore at Çubuklu — accessed by hotel boat; full evening commitment.

sisli-nisantasi.name: Sade Kahve
sisli-nisantasi.note: Perfect Turkish coffee + börek breakfast. Sit, watch the neighborhood.

goreme.name: Topdeck Cave Restaurant
goreme.note: Reservation-only in a real cave. Chef Mustafa cooks one sitting per night.

goreme.name: Dibek
goreme.note: Testi kebab (sealed clay pot, broken at the table). Order it 4 hours ahead.

goreme.name: Seten Restaurant
goreme.note: Best fine dining in the region — terraces over Göreme, modern Cappadocian.

uchisar.name: Lil'a at Museum Hotel
uchisar.note: Michelin-Key hotel's restaurant. Cliffside terrace; book early.

uchisar.name: Seki Restaurant at Argos
uchisar.note: Argos cellars 'kitchen of the priest' — atmospheric, slow, romantic.

uchisar.name: Center Café
uchisar.note: Lokanta in central Uçhisar. Solid, cheap, what the locals actually eat.

urgup.name: Ziggy's Cafe
urgup.note: Long-running expat-favorite courtyard restaurant; fixed-price chef's menu works.

urgup.name: Old Greek House
urgup.note: 1860s mansion with a courtyard. The full Cappadocian wine pairing is excellent.

urgup.name: Han Çırağan
urgup.note: Ürgüp meatball-and-soup spot, no English menu, perfect lunch.

kaleici.name: Seraser Fine Dining
kaleici.note: Ottoman mansion in Kaleiçi; tasting menu pairs with Anatolian wines.

kaleici.name: 7 Mehmet
kaleici.note: Antalya institution since 1962. Seafood with a sea view; do the meze run.

kaleici.name: Vanilla Lounge
kaleici.note: Casual courtyard near the harbor. Light Mediterranean lunch + wine.

lara.name: Big Chef's Lara
lara.note: The dependable steakhouse for resort guests escaping all-inclusive food fatigue.

lara.name: Falez Restaurant
lara.note: Cliffside seafood with Mediterranean panoramas; good for special evenings.

konyaalti.name: Club Arma
konyaalti.note: Yacht-club restaurant near the harbor, fish-of-the-day plates.

konyaalti.name: Lara Sini Et Mangal
konyaalti.note: Family kebab house away from the resort strip; what locals book.
